title: Trans Flag Spyglass
description: this is pretty small texture pack that I made for the Pirates Pride jam on planet minecraft, and moved over to java :3 I hope you like it!
body: This is a small texture pack, making a 2d spyglass with trans flag colors! I initially made it for the Pirates Pride jam on Planet Minecraft, for Bedrock, but this is my attempt at a Java version! It's also intended to remove the spyglass overlay, but this may be difficult if you're using sodium :'D
